mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS trends lower, discount rates and refinancing costs fall, which lifts equity valuation multiples and supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns are not higher than baseline after months with a negative 3-month change in FEDFUNDS, or if the sign flips in more than 40% of such cases.

mechanism_narrative: A strong monthly rise in RSAFS signals accelerating nominal consumption and revenue growth, which improves earnings expectations and pushes S&P 500 returns higher over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS growth turns positive after a 3-month slowdown
failure_condition: Reject if triggered RSAFS upturns are followed by negative or flat 20-day SPX returns in more than 60% of instances, or if the average forward return is below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: A falling UNRATE indicates labor-market tightening and income stability, which supports household spending and reduces recession risk, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE falls by at least 0.2 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day forward SPX returns are not positive on average following 3-month declines in UNRATE, or if the hit rate is below 55% across triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: Rising INDPRO reflects improving industrial output and cyclical earnings leverage, which should translate into positive S&P 500 performance over the next month when manufacturing activity is expanding.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month change is positive and above its prior 12-month median
failure_condition: Reject if positive INDPRO momentum does not improve subsequent 20-day SPX returns relative to the sample mean, or if the signal is negative in a majority of expansion-triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: When HOUST and RSAFS both accelerate, the economy is showing synchronized housing and consumption demand strength, which raises earnings breadth and supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint state of rising HOUST and rising RSAFS fails to outperform either series alone, or if triggered 20-day SPX returns are not positive in at least 55% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: A high FEDFUNDS rate combined with rising CPIAUCSL indicates tightening real financial conditions and inflation pressure, which compresses equity multiples and predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS exceeds CPI inflation trend: FEDFUNDS > 4% and CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized change is rising
failure_condition: Reject if high-rate, rising-inflation episodes are not followed by lower 5-day SPX returns than baseline, or if the sign is positive in more than 40% of triggered episodes.

mechanism_narrative: A regime in which PAYEMS continues to rise while UNRATE stays low signals durable payroll expansion without slack deterioration, which supports risk appetite and positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous payroll gains and low unemployment do not improve 60-day forward SPX returns, or if the interaction term adds no predictive value beyond either labor series alone.

mechanism_narrative: In a manufacturing rebound, INDPRO rising while HOUST is also firm indicates a broad cyclical upswing in real activity, which should lift earnings expectations and produce positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO and HOUST both rise on a 3-month basis
failure_condition: Reject if joint rises in INDPRO and HOUST do not outperform single-series signals, or if triggered 20-day SPX returns are below the unconditional average for more than 3 consecutive evaluation windows.
